# **What is the solution?**

## Requirements overview (optional)

## User stories / User flow

1. User should be able to view all the pending QC tasks along with the number of all-time pending tasks. 
2. User should be able to see all the completed tasks along with the number of tasks that are completed **Today.**
3. User should be able to see the name of the customer whose application is to be reviewed in QC. 
4. User should be able to
